notes: CPU throughput scales slightly with concurrency (3.91->4.75 rps HTR); search ~identical to GPU

GPU 1.8x faster on HTR (147ms well within 5s/page budget); search sees no GPU benefit (MiniLM 9.3ms is 100x under 1s target — headroom for re-ranking); throughput flat at ~6.8 rps HTR (single uvicorn worker). Triton next step: dynamic batching for throughput under concurrent load, not single-request latency. MiniLM can stay on CPU in GPU deployment.
